differential_diagnoses: Chronic lymphocytic leukemia with cutaneous involvement
next_steps: Excisional biopsy of enlarged lymph node for histopathology, immunohistochemistry, and flow cytometry
Peripheral blood flow cytometry for T-cell phenotyping and Sezary cell count
T-cell receptor (TCR) gene rearrangement studies on skin biopsy and blood
Repeat skin biopsy for deeper analysis including CD3, CD4, CD8, CD7, and CD26 staining
Biopsy and PET/CT-guided sampling of the pulmonary mass
